zh.siteSubtitle: 葡萄牙圣母显灵与三个秘密（1917）
zh.homeTitle: 法蒂玛圣母显灵是什么？
zh.homeIntro1: 1917年5月13日至10月13日，在葡萄牙法蒂玛镇附近的科瓦达伊里亚，三位牧童——露西亚·桑托斯（10岁）、弗朗西斯科·马尔托（9岁）和雅辛塔·马尔托（7岁）——声称在六个月内六次见到圣母玛利亚显现。圣母要求他们每月13日回到同一地点祈祷，并向他们传达了三个秘密。
zh.homeIntro2: 法蒂玛三个秘密按时间顺序揭示：第一秘密是地狱的异象；第二秘密包含二战爆发的预言、俄罗斯奉献给圣母无玷圣心的要求、以及共产主义扩散的警告；第三秘密涉及教会的迫害和教宗遇刺的异象，直到2000年才由梵蒂冈正式公布。
zh.homeIntro3: 1917年10月13日的「太阳奇迹」是法蒂玛事件中最引人注目的事件，约7万人目睹太阳在天空中异常运动。1930年，天主教会正式承认法蒂玛显灵的「超自然性质」。弗朗西斯科和雅辛塔于2017年被封为圣人，露西亚于2005年去世后启动了封圣程序。
zh.coreQuote: 「你们已经看到了可怜的罪人要去的地狱。为了拯救他们，天主愿意在世界上建立对我无玷圣心的敬礼。如果人们按照我的要求去做，许多灵魂将得救，世界将获得和平。」
keyPointsList: 1917年5月13日 —— 圣母首次显现于科瓦达伊里亚，要求三牧童每月13日回来
1917年7月13日 —— 圣母传达三个秘密，包括地狱异象和二战预言
1917年10月13日 —— 太阳奇迹发生，约7万人目睹
1930年 —— 天主教会正式承认法蒂玛显灵的超自然性质
1941年 —— 露西亚写下第一和第二秘密的详细记录
1981年 —— 教宗若望保禄二世遇刺，他将自己的生还归因于法蒂玛圣母
2000年 —— 梵蒂冈正式公布第三秘密
sourceList: 预言内容主要来自露西亚修女的回忆录及梵蒂冈官方文件（梵蒂冈：法蒂玛讯息）
历史背景参考自多部学术著作和新闻报道（Wikipedia）
验证评价基于公开历史记录和教会文件
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用六角星符号——象征圣母玛利亚的传统标志，源自天主教「海之星」（Stella Maris）的称号

en.siteSubtitle: The Marian Apparitions and Three Secrets (1917)
en.homeIntro1: From May 13 to October 13, 1917, at the Cova da Iria near Fatima, Portugal, three shepherd children — Lucia Santos (age 10), Francisco Marto (age 9), and Jacinta Marto (age 7) — reported six apparitions of the Virgin Mary over six consecutive months. Our Lady asked them to return on the 13th of each month to pray, and revealed to them three secrets.
en.homeIntro2: The Three Secrets of Fatima were revealed in sequence: the First Secret was a vision of hell; the Second Secret contained predictions of World War II, a request for the consecration of Russia to the Immaculate Heart of Mary, and a warning about the spread of communism; the Third Secret concerned the persecution of the Church and a vision of a pope being shot, and was not officially released by the Vatican until 2000.
en.homeIntro3: The 'Miracle of the Sun' on October 13, 1917, is the most remarkable event associated with Fatima — approximately 70,000 people witnessed the sun appearing to move erratically across the sky. In 1930, the Catholic Church officially recognized the 'supernatural character' of the Fatima apparitions. Francisco and Jacinta were canonized as saints in 2017, and Lucia's cause for canonization was opened after her death in 2005.
en.coreQuote: "You have seen hell where the souls of poor sinners go. To save them, God wishes to establish in the world devotion to my Immaculate Heart. If what I say to you is done, many souls will be saved and there will be peace."
keyPointsList: May 13, 1917 —— First apparition at Cova da Iria; Our Lady asks the children to return monthly
July 13, 1917 —— Our Lady reveals the Three Secrets, including the vision of hell and WWII prediction
October 13, 1917 —— The Miracle of the Sun witnessed by ~70,000 people
1930 —— Catholic Church officially recognizes the supernatural character of the apparitions
1941 —— Lucia writes detailed accounts of the First and Second Secrets
1981 —— Pope John Paul II is shot; he attributes his survival to Our Lady of Fatima
2000 —— Vatican officially releases the Third Secret
sourceList: Prophecy content primarily from Sister Lucia's memoirs and official Vatican documents (Vatican: Message of Fatima)
Historical background drawn from multiple academic works and news reports (Wikipedia)
Verification based on public historical records and Church documents
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: six-pointed star symbol — a traditional Marian emblem derived from the Catholic title 'Stella Maris' (Star of the Sea)
